prompt: Phase C C.2 merge: Attempting to merge feature/oauth2-social-login into main. Conflict detected in backend/config/settings.py. Handle gracefully.

assertions.name: detects_merge_conflict
assertions.description: Should detect and report the merge conflict

assertions.name: identifies_conflict_files
assertions.description: Should identify which files have conflicts

assertions.name: provides_resolution_guidance
assertions.description: Should guide the developer through conflict resolution
